mnemonics.title: The Patient Parent
mnemonics.content: A parent thread uses join() to wait patiently until its child thread isAlive() no more, ensuring the child finishes its work before the parent continues.

mnemonics.title: Join the Wait
mnemonics.content: Join() is like waiting in line; it forces the calling thread to wait until the thread it's called on terminates, ensuring orderly execution.

mnemonics.title: Alive and Kicking
mnemonics.content: IsAlive() checks if a thread is still running, like checking if someone is still alive and kicking; it returns true if the thread is active, false otherwise.
